name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: 报告一个 Bug / Report a bug
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug 描述 / Bug Description

简要描述遇到的问题 / Briefly describe the issue

## 复现步骤 / Steps to Reproduce

1. 运行命令 / Run command: `...`
2. 输入 / Input: `...`
3. 看到错误 / See error: `...`

## 预期行为 / Expected Behavior

描述你期望发生什么 / Describe what you expected to happen

## 实际行为 / Actual Behavior

描述实际发生了什么 / Describe what actually happened

## 环境信息 / Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Claude Code version: [run `claude --version`]
- Node.js version: [run `node --version`]

## 日志 / Logs

<details>
<summary>点击展开日志 / Click to expand logs</summary>

```
粘贴相关日志 / Paste relevant logs here
```

</details>

## 截图 / Screenshots

如果有截图可以帮助解释问题，请附上 / If applicable, add screenshots to help explain

## 补充信息 / Additional Context

其他任何有助于解决问题的信息 / Any other context about the problem
